card_description: A.E. van Vogt is a fictional character referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 3 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies his experience as an "evolutionary advance" (Cosmic Consciousness) and the "next step up" for the human species."
